basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: The Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website.Has been announced through the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have completed MSc in Chemistry or ME/MTech in relevant interdisciplinary branches with at least 60% marks are eligible to apply for these Junior Research Fellow vacancies. The application process for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 07 June 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and a

qualification.education_qualification: MSc in Chemistry (with at least 60 % marks) or ME/MTech
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: MSc in Chemistry (with at least 60 % marks) ME/MTech in interdisciplinary branches relevant to the topic (with at least 60% marks) Lab experience in Inorganic chemistry, Synthesis and Electrochemistry is preferred.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at BITS Pilani is 07 June 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an MSc in Chemistry with at least 60% marks or an ME/MTech in interdisciplinary branches relevant to the project topic, also with at least 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this position?
faq.answer: While not strictly mandatory, lab experience in Inorganic chemistry, Synthesis, and Electrochemistry is preferred for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email. You must send your application and curriculum vitae with research experience details to the specified email addresses.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position at BITS Pilani will involve an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any specific requirements for the email subject line?
faq.answer: Yes, the email subject line must clearly state “Application for Junior Research Fellow Position under BITS Pilani CDRF Funded Project”.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from across India apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, the job is open to candidates from across India, with positions available in Goa and Pilani campuses.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" heading.
